case_title: RALPH RACHAL VS. BEST COLLATERAL INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE: ADDRESS CHANGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RACHAL, RALPH
RETURN MAIL JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS (BLANK REQUEST) RETURNED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: ROBERT VERHOEFF) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RACHAL, RALPH AS TO DEFENDANT BEST COLLATERAL INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/01/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT BEST COLLATERAL INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEST COLLATERAL INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RALPH RACHAL. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY RACHAL, RALPH AS TO DEFENDANT BEST COLLATERAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RACHAL, RALPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEST COLLATERAL INC. $794.33 PRINCIPAL, $38.98 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $878.31, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE PLAINTIFF $794.33 PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST ON REPAIR COSTS OF $144.33 FROM 1/15/2016 THROUGH JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT BEST COLLATERAL INC.
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S SIGNED REQUEST FOR FUNDS: RETURNED AND FORWARDED TO ACCT DEPT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RACHAL, RALPH
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $889.86 RE 35650 FOR TRANSACTION W0418B29D002 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO RALPH RACHAL, DOC #1909535262, WARRANT #38205650, DATED JAN-02-2019
